title: Spree Admin API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from Spree Admin API OpenAPI 3.0 specification

from.description: Index of first record on this page

to.description: Index of last record on this page

in.description: Number of records on this page

PermissionRule.description: A single permission rule (CanCanCan rule). Rules are applied in order, last-matching-wins.

has_conditions.description: True if the server-side rule has per-record conditions. The SPA shows the action optimistically and handles 403 from the API.

MeResponse.description: Current admin user profile and serialized permissions

step.description: Checkout step this requirement belongs to

field.description: Field that needs to be satisfied

CartWarning.description: A warning about a cart issue (e.g., item removed due to stock change)

message.example: Blue T-Shirt was removed because it was sold out

FulfillmentManifestItem.description: An item within a fulfillment — which line item and how many units are in this fulfillment

AdminUserRoleAssignment.description: A role assignment for the current store on a staff member

PreferenceField.description: A single configurable preference on a payment method, promotion rule/action, or calculator. The frontend uses `type` + `default` to render a sensible input.

type.description: string | text | password | integer | decimal | boolean | array | hash

default.description: Default value (any JSON type), null when there is no default

PromotionActionCalculator.description: The action's nested calculator (when the action carries one — null for actions like `free_shipping`)

type.description: Wire shorthand for the calculator subclass

PromotionActionLineItem.description: One row in a `create_line_items` action — the variant added to the order and how many
